name: Breakfast Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously oil a 9-inch cast-iron skillet with butter and heat in the oven while mixing ingredients.
2. Combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, fruit, and sugar and set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until peaks form and set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, blend milk, egg yolks, corn, and cheese.
5. Combine the milk mixture with dry ingredients, then fold in egg whites.
6. Remove the hot pan from the oven. Sprinkle bacon over the bottom of the pan, then spread the dough mixture evenly on top.
7. Bake at 425 degrees for 20 minutes.
8. Carefully turn out onto a serving platter.
9. Serve warm with butter.
